title: Global Grain Trade Prospects Remain Encouraging
section_path: Global Grain Trade Prospects Remain Encouraging
section_path_text: Global Grain Trade Prospects Remain Encouraging
summary:
Main
By Jeffrey Landsberg
Global grain trade prospects remain just one of many bullish facets of the dry bulk market. Notable recently is that grain trade forecasts for the upcoming season have been lowered from a month ago, but significant year-on-year growth is still expected. The United States Department of Agriculture recently released their latest forecasts for 2021/22 and is now forecasting that global exports will total 491 million tons.
